title: E1M module footprint (physical pad geometry)
description: The E1M physical footprint: pad-grid positions + the standard's fixed function->pad assignment. One shared file per footprint revision; the E1M footprint is a common standard across module variants (AEN/V2N/NX9). Hand-transcribed source data (not generated). Positions are grid indices (row-letter order x column 1..34); millimetre coordinates are added from the mechanical drawing / CAD when confirmed.

footprint_rev.description: Datasheet/standard revision this transcription follows, e.g. 'DS-AEN-001 Rev 0.8'.

provenance.description: datasheet_confirmed once mm coordinates + row order are checked against the mechanical drawing / CAD footprint; web_provisional while positions are grid-index-derived and pitch/mm are pending.

view.description: Which face of the module the pad grid is drawn from, per the mechanical drawing's view caption.

a1_corner.description: Which corner of the drawn view pad A1 (row[0] + col 1) occupies, per the mechanical drawing's view caption.

pitch_mm.description: Nominal pad pitch; null until confirmed from the mechanical drawing.

rows.description: Authoritative ordered row-letter sequence (ALP's own non-JEDEC ordering, top->bottom). A pad's y-index is its position in this list.

pad.description: LGA pad id = row + col, e.g. 'A3', 'AD2'.

e1m_function.description: The E1M standard's fixed function on this pad (e.g. 'PWM6'). Present for muxable/functional pads; joins to pinmux-capability e1m_function. Omit for power/ground/nc/reserved.
